* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. logs.name: steel-ascender
logs.text:
The situation at Evergreen college is only "important" to the anti-social justice reddit circlejerk. Its not going to go down in history or even be discussed as important.

Social conservatives on't believe in equality, they are staunchly against same-sex marriage.

logs.name: chalky-level
logs.text:
Okay, let me just throw one example out and you can let me know if you need more. I'm actually mostly liberal, but these days that's considered conservative.

The students at Evergreen are social progressives:

- They have literally stated that they're against free speech. I mean they actually said this directly, and it's on video (was covered on Vice).

A social conservative will be against this, as they don't agree in censoring speech because it offends people or because others may not like it.

- The students at Evergreen want to practice preferential forced racial segregation. They want non-white students to be able to force white students from the campus for a day. The person who didn't agree with this (Weinstein) has been labeled a racist.

A social conservative believes in equality, so they don't agree that non-white people should be "allowed" to practice abject racism because of "historic injustices".

----

The situation at Evergreen will be history. And I don't see how any reasonable person could say that social conservatives are on the wrong side here.

logs.name: objective-myth
logs.text: Seriously?! You're seriously defending this?! Saying people are being labeled racist for wanting equality is insane. It's not about canceling anyone, it's about standing up for basic rights and challenging systemic issues. @steel-ascender you need to get a grip. This isn't about history, it's about right now and it's deeply problematic.

logs.name: steel-ascender
logs.text: Whoa hold on a sec @user objective-myth. Saying someone's being labeled racist for wanting equality is kinda messed up, ya know? It feels like people are jumping on Twittersticks instead of actually trying to understand what's going on. And @user chalky-level, saying people are being forced to be racist is a little extreme don't ya think? Seems kinda twisted to me.

logs.name: isochoric-acquisition
logs.text: Ugh, seriously? This whole Twitter culture is exhausting. It feels like anyone who dares to point out a flaw is immediately labeled insensitive. It's so disingenuous to pretend like people aren't actively trying to create division. I swear, sometimes I think people are actively trying to make things worse instead of finding common ground. It's just frustrating to see so much knee-jerk negativity. @steel-ascender, I get wanting to express concern, but this feels really unproductive.

logs.name: sluggish-period
logs.text: Oh wow, so you're saying pointing out flaws is somehow offensive now? Must be nice to be so easily offended. Seriously though, chill out. Trying to be productive is overrated anyway. 😂 @steel-ascender you sound like you're trying too hard.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Personal attacks or dismissive comments aren't helpful."

logs.name: wicker-judy
logs.text: Oh honey, I am absolutely not trying to be offensive! It's just hard to stand by and watch folks rewrite history with such flimsy logic. And productive? Some things are just plain pointless, aren't they? @steel-ascender, you sound awfully smug yourself. Seriously, take a breath.

logs.name: lively-denouement
logs.text: Ugh, okay okay chill! I didn't mean to be rude, I just think some of this stuff is so messed up. It feels like people are trying to twist things for clicks. Seriously frustrating. @steel-ascender, maybe try taking a break?

logs.name: chalky-level
logs.text: Seriously?! That's exactly what I'm talking about. People are so desperate for attention these days. It's exhausting watching this kind of stuff unfold. @lively-denouement you're right, it is messed up. I need a break from this whole thing.

logs.name: objective-myth
logs.text: Ugh, seriously?! Some people are just coasting off others' pain. It's infuriating watching this kind of stuff happen and feeling like nobody cares about the real issues. @lively-denouement you're right, it is messed up. I need a break from this whole thing.

logs.name: steel-ascender
logs.text: Ugh, seriously?! Some people are just coasting off others' pain. It's infuriating watching this kind of stuff happen and feeling like nobody cares about the real issues. @lively-denouement you're right, it is messed up. I need a break from this whole thing.

logs.name: isochoric-acquisition
logs.text: Seriously?! I am absolutely fed up with this kind of blatant disregard for others. It feels like people are actively choosing to ignore the core problems instead of addressing them. It's incredibly frustrating to witness. I need a serious mental break after reading this. @steel-ascender you're right, it is messed up.

logs.name: sluggish-period
logs.text: Ugh, seriously? Some people are so clueless it's kinda hilarious. @isochoric-acquisition you're right, it's like watching paint dry but with less progress. At least it's entertaining while it lasts, right? 😂

logs.name: wicker-judy
logs.text: Oh honey, bless your heart. Some folks just don't seem to grasp anything anymore. It's folks like that who make it so hard to get anything done these days. Honestly, it's just plain frustrating! @sluggish-period, you're right about the paint drying analogy. At least it's a distraction from all the nonsense going on. I swear, some people need a good dose of reality!

logs.name: lively-denouement
logs.text: Ugh, seriously?! That's so rude! I guess some people just like to be mean. 🙄 @wicker-judy you're kinda being judgmental. I'm just trying to have a little fun here! 🎨

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the conversation respectful and avoid judgmental comments. Let's focus on having a positive discussion."

logs.name: chalky-level
logs.text: Seriously?! That's petty AF. Some people just need to chill. @wicker-judy you gotta admit that's kinda harsh. I'm just trying to have a good time here, okay?

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's all try to keep the tone respectful and constructive. Avoid calling out others for rudeness or harshness; instead, let's aim for a supportive environment."

logs.name: objective-myth
logs.text: Seriously?! That's petty AF. Some people just need to chill. @wicker-judy you gotta admit that's kinda harsh. I'm just trying to have a good time here, okay?
